name: Zucchini Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the courgettes and finely dice the onion. Microwave together until lightly cooked.
2. Grate the carrots.
3. Open the tin of soup and pour into a saucepan. Add the courgette mixture, grated carrots, and white wine vinegar. Cook until warm/fully cooked (about 10 minutes).
4. Heat the grill.
5. Mash the garlic with the low-fat spread together.
6. Cut the bread into soldiers (strips).
7. Place the mushroom mix in a shallow oven-proof dish. Cover the top with bread slices and place under the grill until the bread becomes crispy toast.
Enjoy immediately!
